summary: Portfolio remains yellow but shows mixed signals: chief-scout critical test failures persist while soft-power development completely stalled for the second consecutive week. Several projects demonstrate positive momentum, but deploy infrastructure gaps and technical debt continue to create systemic risks across high-priority initiatives.
